import pandas as pd


def combine_csv_files(file_paths):
    result = pd.DataFrame()
    for path in file_paths:
        chunk = pd.read_csv(path)
        result = pd.concat([result, chunk], ignore_index=True)
    return result


def aggregate_monthly_data(dataframes):
    combined = pd.DataFrame()
    for month_df in dataframes:
        monthly = month_df.groupby("region").sum()
        combined = pd.concat([combined, monthly])
    return combined


def build_report(sources):
    report = pd.DataFrame()
    for source in sources:
        df = fetch_data(source)
        report = pd.concat([report, df], ignore_index=True)
    return report


def fetch_data(source):
    return pd.DataFrame({"value": [1, 2, 3]})
